message.content:
@startuml

box "sw-explorer" #LightGray
participant WebApp
participant SWData
end box

box "Example background processing module" #LightGray
participant Manager
participant MessageQueue
participant Worker
participant Memcache
end box

[-> WebApp : fetch new collection
WebApp -> SWData : fetch new collection
SWData -> Manager : schedule a job

note over Manager, Memcache #LightYellow
This is just an example.
We could got wi go with Celery, but sometimes it's good
to hide the concrete engine behind the abstraction layer.
end note

Manager -> MessageQueue : schedule a job
MessageQueue -> Worker : execute a job
Worker -> Manager : update job status
Manager -> Memcache : update job status
Worker -> Manager : job result
Manager -> Memcache : job result

[-> WebApp : view pending collection
WebApp -> SWData : get job status
SWData -> Manager : get job status
Manager -> Memcache : get job status

@enduml
